All doctors in England warned to watch for meningitis symptoms after Kent outbreakHealth workers across England are urged to look out for signs of infection as thousands have jabs. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c20z08rdd9ro?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c20z08rdd9ro#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 18:41:54 GMT
Why has this meningitis outbreak spread so fast?There have been 20 cases since the weekend in one small area of Kent - but this isn't the normal pattern, so what could have happened? https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cqlglkprv0qo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cqlglkprv0qo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 16:34:33 GMT
Two men charged with allegedly spying on London Jewish community for IranCounter Terrorism Policing had been investigating alleged surveillance of locations and individuals linked to London's Jewish community. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwygyvrwq89o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwygyvrwq89o#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 21:58:34 GMT
Fly tippers in England face clearing up own rubbish as punishmentFly tippers could face up to 20 hours of community service removing rubbish they have illegally dumped. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c9dn770n1deo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c9dn770n1deo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 17:13:28 GMT
King praises 'living bridge' with Nigeria at glitzy banquetAt the state banquet in Windsor Castle, King Charles praises the UK's partnership with Nigeria. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cedzqqp9x2do?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cedzqqp9x2do#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 21:24:14 GMT
UK temperature reaches 21C in warmest day of year so farThe UK has seen its warmest day of the year so far with temperatures reaching 21C. https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/crl4g65wzepo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/crl4g65wzepo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 15:41:47 GMT
PM swerves questions on whether he spoke to Mandelson over Epstein friendshipConservative leader Kemi Badenoch repeatedly asks if the prime minister spoke to Peter Mandelson about his friendship with Jeffrey Epstein before picking him to be a UK ambassador. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c7vjv17q0rmo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c7vjv17q0rmo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 15:01:16 GMT
Sony removes 135,000 deepfakes of its artists' musicThe company says the proliferation of AI has enabled people to upload fake songs to streaming sites. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy57593gxe0o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy57593gxe0o#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 17:19:41 GMT
Cost of online passport application could rise to over £100 The Home Office says the increase will help it "move to a system that meets its costs through those who use it" and rely less on taxpayers. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czx7x7wy1e2o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czx7x7wy1e2o#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 19:32:09 GMT
Government increases BBC World Service funding by £33m over three yearsThe funding increase is about 8% up on the previous financial year, the government will announce on Thursday. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn0z0k7wdleo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn0z0k7wdleo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 22:00:04 GMT
'This is the first time I've left my room since the outbreak'Twenty people are confirmed or suspected to have fallen ill with meningitis in the Canterbury area. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce949xj7d8jo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce949xj7d8jo#1 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 16:42:10 GMT
